case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. WILBER VLADIMIR HERRERA JACOBO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIE SALAS LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA MARISOL DIAZ CASTILLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBO, WILBER VLADIMIR HERRERA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-04-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST APPEARED AT THE 8:30 HEARING FOR ANOTHER MATTER. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THEY WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO APPEAR FOR THE 10:00 A.M. HEARING AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE AT THAT TIME. DEFENDANT WILBUR VLADIMIR HERRERA JACOBO IS NOT PRESENT AT THE 10 A.M. HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBO, WILBER VLADIMIR HERRERA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. MATTER CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2019 AT 8:30 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBO, WILBER VLADIMIR HERRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACOBO, WILBER VLADIMIR HERRERA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
